# Arkansas Everywhere — Arkansas Community Calendar

> Crawlable community knowledge graph for Arkansas events, organizations, and local life.

## About

Arkansas Everywhere (Arkansas Community Calendar) is a public, community-first calendar and directory for all 75 Arkansas counties. It indexes festivals, church dinners, school events, races, parades, volunteer opportunities, and important civic dates.

We do not invent facts. Profile pages show **Information last refreshed**, **Source confidence** (high / medium / low / placeholder), and source links when available. Placeholder or stale data is labeled clearly.

## Primary routes

- `/` — Home and discovery
- `/calendar`, `/calendar/day`, `/calendar/week`, `/calendar/month` — Calendar views
- `/event/:slug` — Event detail pages
- `/:citySlug` — City community profiles (e.g. `/conway`)
- `/:countySlug-county` — County profiles (e.g. `/pulaski-county`)
- `/organization/:slug` — Organization profiles
- `/church/:slug`, `/school/:slug`, `/college/:slug` — Typed institution profiles
- `/candidate/:slug` — Public candidate community context (not an endorsement)
- `/race/:slug`, `/festival/:slug`, `/parade/:slug` — Tradition and race profiles
- `/volunteer/:slug` — Volunteer opportunity profiles
- `/date/:slug` — Important Arkansas dates

## Directories

- `/churches`, `/schools`, `/colleges`
- `/races`, `/festivals`, `/parades`
- `/volunteer-opportunities`, `/dates`
- `/organizations`, `/counties`

## Data freshness & verification

- **High confidence**: refreshed within 30 days with sources on file
- **Medium**: 31–120 days or partial sourcing
- **Low / stale**: 120+ days since refresh
- **Placeholder**: no verified source links — do not cite as fact

Report updates: `/help-build-the-calendar`

## Sitemap

Full URL list: `/sitemap.xml`

## Contact / updates

Community hosts can claim listings via `/host`. Operators review submissions at `/admin` (token required).
